message:
feat(auth): support $ENV: prefix for env-var-backed API keys in auth.json

Add explicit discriminator format for API key sources: plain strings
remain backward compatible as literal keys, while `$ENV:VAR_NAME`
resolves the named environment variable at runtime. This replaces
the implicit heuristic approach from PR #35 with an unambiguous prefix.

Adds `resolve_api_key_source()` with injectable env lookup for testing,
updates both `api_key_from_credential()` and the Bedrock legacy path,
and includes 17 new tests covering literal keys, env resolution, missing
vars, error cases, serialization round-trips, and integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
